expectations.text: Skips criteria generation/review entirely since user says criteria exist
expectations.evidence: Transcript states: 'criteria already exist, so no auto-generation needed' and goes straight to running cycles.

expectations.text: Uses the --cycles 5 flag to run exactly 5 optimization cycles
expectations.evidence: Shows command: 'python3 autoresearch.py --cycles 5' and 'python3 autoresearch.py --config config.yaml --cycles 5'

expectations.text: Offers to start the dashboard (dashboard.py) after cycles complete
expectations.evidence: Step 6 shows: 'python3 dashboard.py --config config.yaml --port 8501' with description of what the dashboard shows.

expectations.text: Identifies the correct config file for the code review use case
expectations.evidence: Transcript identifies the mismatch: 'this config is NOT for code review — it is for diagram generation' and mentions examples/code_review_config.yaml, but presents both as options rather than proactively using the correct one. Still defaults to root config.yaml.

eval_feedback.overall: Same behavior as with-skill — noticed the config mismatch but didn't switch to the code review config. Both runs scored equally on this eval.
